docket_entries.description: ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: GRANTED [REQUEST: DISMISSAL WAS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE REQUEST IS TO DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE]
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO APPEARNCE BY PLAINTIFF.
ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2020 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (M. JONES)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PER COURT ORDER (SC-105A) ISSUED: MAY 11, 2021.
